title: OPRT Stock Earnings: Oportun Financial Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q1 2024
text: Oportun Financial (NASDAQ: OPRT) exceeded analyst expectations in its first quarter 2024 results. The financial services company delivered earnings per share of 9 cents compared to a projected loss of 26 cents per share. The firm generated $250.50 million in revenue, surpassing the anticipated $240.52 million by approximately 4.15%. This represents a solid beat on the top line. The earnings report demonstrated stronger-than-expected profitability and revenue generation, with the company turning profitable on an EPS basis when analysts had forecasted a loss.
